login.subtitle:
Write reviews and discover
recommended places from people who share your taste
login.footer: By signing in, you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
tutorial.step1.title: Welcome to K-daejeop! 👋
tutorial.step1.body:
Rate restaurants, cafes & attractions.
Contribute 10 reviews to unlock
recommendations from other users.
tutorial.step2.title: Search for places 🔍
tutorial.step2.body:
Type a restaurant, cafe, or attraction
name in the search bar to get
real-time suggestions.
tutorial.step3.title: Four-tier ratings ⭐
tutorial.step3.body:
✕ Never again — Would never revisit
⭐ Casual visit — A nice local spot to drop by
⭐⭐ Recommended — Worth recommending to visitors
⭐⭐⭐ Must-visit — A place you must tell everyone about
tutorial.step4.title: A photo is a must! 📸
tutorial.step4.body:
Please attach at least one photo
with your review.
A short note helps you
remember later.
tutorial.step5.title: 10 reviews → unlock picks 🎉
tutorial.step5.body:
Contribute 10 or more reviews
to unlock recommendations
from other users!
Your reviews earn you rewards.

map.gpsOutOfRange: Your location is outside of Korea.
myReviews.title: My Places
myReviews.emptyDesc:
Search for a place and leave a review.
Your picks will appear here!

changelog.title: What's New
changelog.cosmeticSystem: Cosmetic system is here! Collect reviews to unlock star colors, frames, effects, tails, and stamps for your pins.
changelog.hiddenItems: 4 premium-exclusive hidden items added. Collect reviews to unlock special rewards!
changelog.searchMiniPin: Review pins now shrink to mini dots when searching, so results don't overlap.
landing.aboutDesc: K-daejeop is your personal place journal for restaurants, cafes, and attractions in Korea. Leave honest reviews with a 4-tier rating and photos, and after 10 reviews, discover recommended places from people with similar taste.
landing.step1: Search for a restaurant, cafe, or attraction in the search bar
landing.step2: Rate it with a 4-tier system (✕·⭐·⭐⭐·⭐⭐⭐) and leave a review with a photo
landing.step3: View all your recorded places in the My Places tab
landing.step4: Reach 10 reviews to unlock recommendations from other users
landing.feat.rating: 4-tier ratings — From 'never again' to 'must-visit', an intuitive rating system
landing.feat.verified: Verified visits — GPS-based automatic verification of your actual visits
landing.feat.cluster: Cluster map — See all your recorded places at a glance on the map
landing.feat.badge: Badge boards — Create your own place lists and track visit progress
landing.faq.a1: Yes, all basic features are free. Just sign in with your Google account to get started.
landing.faq.q2: What kind of places can I review?
landing.faq.a2: You can search and review any place registered on Kakao Map in Korea — restaurants, cafes, attractions, and more.
landing.faq.a3: Write 10 or more reviews and recommendations from users with similar taste will be automatically unlocked.
landing.faq.a4: Yes, one photo per review is required. It helps you remember later and is useful for other users too.
landing.faq.a5: A feature to create your own list of places you want to visit. Your progress goes up with each visit, and you earn a badge when you complete them all.
cosmetic.title: My Items
cosmetic.special.premiumOnly: Special items are exclusive to premium members
cosmetic.special.goldProfileDesc: Your avatar gets a shimmering gold border
cosmetic.special.bigPinDesc: Your review pins appear 1.3x larger on the map
cosmetic.special.doublePhotoDesc: Attach up to 2 photos per review
cosmetic.special.doublePublishDesc: Publish badge boards up to 2 times per month
cosmetic.hiddenUnlocked: 🎁 A hidden item has been unlocked!
